# server.landbird_v5_server { #app.server.landbird_v5_server }

`server.landbird_v5_server`

Backend analytical server coordination engine for Landbirds Version 5 models.

Orchestrates reactive pipeline computations, updates filtering ranges, 
handles asynchronous TiTiler spatial metadata statistics collections, and 
renders localized chart widgets, audio tracks, image grids, and datasets.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [landbird_v5_server](#app.server.landbird_v5_server.landbird_v5_server) | Execute reactive data flow state logic for the Version 5 model panel. |

### landbird_v5_server { #app.server.landbird_v5_server.landbird_v5_server }

```python
server.landbird_v5_server.landbird_v5_server(input, output, session)
```

Execute reactive data flow state logic for the Version 5 model panel.

Manages calculations across distinct application pipelines including Leaflet 
map view instances, dynamic dataset slicing using Polars, reactive chart rendering 
via Altair, media galleries, and workbook extraction routines.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type    | Description                                                                      | Default    |
|---------|---------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| input   | Inputs  | Reactive session input dictionary container mapping active interface selections. | _required_ |
| output  | Outputs | Reactive renderer object registry controlling interface output nodes.            | _required_ |
| session | Session | The current active browser runtime and communication link execution loop.        | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description   |
|--------|--------|---------------|
|        | None   |               |
